name: wp-chatgpt-publisher
description: Open-source ChatGPT app for secure WordPress editorial workflows without an OpenAI API key.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @wp-chatgpt-publisher/contracts && npm run build -w @wp-chatgpt-publisher/tool-schemas && concurrently -n server,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @wp-chatgpt-publisher/server" "npm run dev -w @wp-chatgpt-publisher/chatgpt-ui"
scripts.build:shared: npm run build --workspace @wp-chatgpt-publisher/contracts && npm run build --workspace @wp-chatgpt-publisher/tool-schemas && npm run build --workspace @wp-chatgpt-publisher/test-fixtures
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @wp-chatgpt-publisher/contracts && npm run build --workspace @wp-chatgpt-publisher/tool-schemas && npm run build --workspace @wp-chatgpt-publisher/test-fixtures && npm run build --workspace @wp-chatgpt-publisher/chatgpt-ui && npm run build --workspace @wp-chatgpt-publisher/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && tsc -p api/tsconfig.json
